MANOSABA-MADNESS_POWER.description: At 100 stacks on a player, lose 5% max HP and forcibly end that turn. For monsters, the trigger is [gold]player count x 100[/gold] stacks: lose 5% max HP, gain [gold]Stun[/gold], and cannot gain more [gold]Madness[/gold] that turn. At end of turn, lose 5 stacks.

MANOSABA-DOUBLE_SUICIDE_POWER.smartDescr: Take extra damage; at the end of the enemy turn, heal by a percent of HP based on stacks and remove this power.
MANOSABA-PET_ENEMY_AI_POWER.title: Pseudo-Beast Painting
MANOSABA-PET_ENEMY_AI_POWER.description: Summoned monsters act in their original order (attacks and buffs/debuffs only). While one exists, the summoner has 1 less max energy, and that summon takes all unblocked damage that would be dealt to the summoner.
MANOSABA-PET_ENEMY_AI_POWER.smartDescrip: Summoned monsters act in their original order (attacks and buffs/debuffs only). While one exists, the summoner has 1 less max energy, and that summon takes all unblocked damage that would be dealt to the summoner.
MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION_POWER.title: Liquid Manipulation

MANOSABA-LIQUID_MANIPULATION_POWER.smart: Gain damage reduction equal to your stacks as a percentage. Lose 1 stack each turn.
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT_POWER.title: Space Out
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, if you have all six paint orb colors (Red, Orange, Yellow, Green, Blue, Purple), deal 50 damage to all enemies, then evoke all orbs. Otherwise, channel 1 missing color orb at random.
MANOSABA-SPACE_OUT_POWER.smartDescriptio: Start of turn: if all six paint colors are present, deal 50 to all enemies and evoke all orbs; otherwise channel a random missing color orb.
MANOSABA-ZUMA_POWER.title: Zuma
MANOSABA-ZUMA_POWER.description: When 3 adjacent paint orbs match, they evoke together with [gold]1.5x[/gold] effect. Cascades increase the multiplier to [gold]3x[/gold], then [gold]5x[/gold]. While you have Zuma, Noah's Spray Can only generates [gold]Red[/gold], [gold]Blue[/gold], and [gold]Yellow[/gold] paint orbs.
MANOSABA-ZUMA_POWER.smartDescription: 3 matching adjacent paint orbs evoke together at [gold]1.5x[/gold]; cascades become [gold]3x[/gold], then [gold]5x[/gold]. While you have Zuma, Noah's Spray Can only generates [gold]Red[/gold], [gold]Blue[/gold], and [gold]Yellow[/gold] paint orbs.
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.title: Quick Wit
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.description:
At the start of each turn, gain all of the following (values roll within each range):
Gain 1–3 Strength,
Gain −2–2 Dexterity,
HP changes by −10–+10,
All enemies gain 0–2 Vulnerable,
All enemies gain 0–2 Weak.
MANOSABA-QUICK_WIT_POWER.smartDescriptio: At the start of each turn, randomly shift Strength, Dexterity, and HP, and give all enemies Vulnerable and Weak.
MANOSABA-HANGING_KILL_POWER.title: Hanging Kill

MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, lose 20 [gold]Majoka[/gold] and add a [gold]Boulders[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] to your hand that can be played for free this turn.
If your bonded partner dies, you die immediately.
MANOSABA-LIFELONG_FRIEND_POWER.smartDesc: Each turn, lose 20 Majoka and gain a [gold]Boulders[/gold] with [gold]Exhaust[/gold] that can be played for free; you die if your partner dies.

MANOSABA-GAZE_GUIDING_POWER.title: Gaze Guiding

Enemies that attack you deal less damage to you.
Scales with your current [gold]Majoka[/gold] stacks.
Max 50%.

MANOSABA-DISASTER_GIRL_POWER.title: Disaster Girl
MANOSABA-DISASTER_GIRL_POWER.description: Whenever you cumulatively apply 5 [gold]Burn[/gold] to enemies, deal [blue]{Damage}[/blue] damage to a random enemy and gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold].

MANOSABA-SCORCHING_POWER.title: Scorching

MANOSABA-SCALDING_TOUCH_POWER.title: Scalding Touch
MANOSABA-SCALDING_TOUCH_POWER.descriptio: Whenever your Attack deals unblocked damage, apply [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Burn[/gold] to that target and gain [blue]{MajokaGain}[/blue] [gold]Majoka[/gold].

MANOSABA-FIREBALL_SWARM_POWER.descriptio: [gold]Fireball Swarm[/gold]: up to [blue]12[/blue] stacks. After [gold]Block[/gold], each stack spent reduces incoming HP loss by up to [blue]3[/blue] (whole stacks only).
